corrigenda.def: 勘誤表人物 (複數使用) (校)
corrigenda.ex: The book has a long printed corrigenda.

corrigible.def: 可改正的人的人物 (單數) (糾)
corrigible.ex: The error was no longer easily corrigible.

corrigibly.ex: He failed but acted corrigibly at last.

corrivate.def: 匯合、流水聚集的人的人
corrivate.ex: The experts try to corrivate data flows.

corrivery.ex: They held a loud corrivery in the woods.

corroborate.def: 證實、確證、支持的人的人
corroborate.ex: New facts manage to corroborate his story.

corroborated.def: 證實了的、確證的人的人 (或物)
corroborated.ex: His claim was corroborated by three peers.

corroboration.def: 證實、確證的人物 (單數) (確)
corroboration.ex: The police are seeking corroboration now.

corroborative.def: 確證的人、支持的人的人物

corrode.def: 腐蝕、侵蝕、損害的人的人
corrode.ex: Acid rain can corrode metal and stone.

corrosion.def: 腐蝕、侵蝕的人物 (單數) (蝕)
corrosion.ex: Rust is a common form of metal corrosion.

corrosive.def: 腐蝕性的、侵蝕的人的人物 (單數) (蝕)
corrosive.ex: The liquid is highly corrosive and deadly.

corrosively.ex: The salt acted corrosively on the car.

corrugate.def: 使起皺、縮皺的人的人人物 (單數) (皺)
corrugate.ex: The builder decided to corrugate iron.

corrugated.def: 波狀的、起皺的人的人 (或物) (波)
corrugated.ex: The roof was made of corrugated iron.

corrupt.def: 腐敗的、賄賂、敗壞的人的人人物 (單數) (貪)
corrupt.col: corrupt official, morally corrupt, data corrupt
corrupt.ex: He is a very corrupt and greedy official.

corrupted.def: 腐敗了的、損壞了的人的人 (或物) (壞)
corrupted.ex: The file was corrupted and could not open.

corruptible.def: 易腐敗的人、可賄賂地 (貪)
corruptible.ex: The system is highly corruptible and old.

corruption.def: 腐敗、貪汙、(計)損壞的人物 (單數) (貪)
corruption.col: fight corruption, political corruption, data corruption
corruption.ex: The new leader vowed to fight corruption.

corruptive.def: 腐敗的人、致敗壞的人的人物
corruptive.ex: Lust has a very corruptive influence.

corsage.def: 胸花、女裝胸部人物 (單數) (花)
corsage.ex: She wore a white orchid corsage today.

corsair.def: 海盜、海盜船人物 (單數) (盜)
corsair.ex: The famed corsair robbed many ships.

corset.def: 束腹、緊身褡人物 (單數) (束)
corset.ex: She wore a tight corset under her dress.

cortex.def: (生)皮質、大腦皮層人物 (單數) (皮)
cortex.ex: The cerebral cortex handles logic tonight.

cortical.def: 皮質的人、皮層的人的人物
cortical.ex: The doctor examined the cortical area.

cortisone.def: (藥)可體松、皮質類固醇人物 (單數) (藥)
cortisone.ex: He received a local cortisone injection.

coruscant.def: 閃閃發光的人的人物 (光)
coruscant.ex: The coruscant light shone on the hill.

coruscate.ex: Her speech began to coruscate with wit.

corvette.def: (軍)輕護衛艦、巡邏艇人物 (單數) (艦)
corvette.ex: The fast corvette chased the pirate ship.

coryza.ex: He suffered from acute coryza all night.

cosmetic.def: 化妝品的、美容的人、化妝品的人的人物 (單數) (妝)
cosmetic.ex: She decided to have a cosmetic surgery.

cosmetics.def: 化妝品(總稱)人物 (複數使用) (妝)
cosmetics.ex: She spent a lot on expensive cosmetics.

cosmic.def: 宇宙的、極大的人的人物 (宇)
cosmic.col: cosmic rays, cosmic dust, cosmic radiation
cosmic.ex: Cosmic rays come from outer space now.

cosmogonist.def: 宇宙進化論者人物 (單數)
cosmogonist.ex: The learned cosmogonist wrote a book.

cosmogony.def: 宇宙進化論、天體演化學人物 (單數)
cosmogony.ex: They studied cosmogony in the class.

cosmographer.def: 宇宙誌編撰者人物 (單數)
cosmographer.ex: The expert cosmographer made a map.

cosmography.def: 宇宙記述、宇宙誌人物 (單數)
cosmography.ex: He read a book on ancient cosmography.

cosmologic.ex: The scientist gave a cosmologic theory.

cosmologist.ex: Stephen Hawking was a famed cosmologist.

cosmology.ex: Modern cosmology is a very deep science.

cosmonaut.def: 俄國太空人、航天員人物 (單數) (宇)
cosmonaut.ex: The brave cosmonaut went to the moon.

cosmopolitan.def: 世界性的、四海為家的、世界主義者的人的人物 (單數) (博)
cosmopolitan.ex: London is a truly cosmopolitan city now.

cosmopolite.def: 四海為家的人、世界主義者人物 (單數)
cosmopolite.ex: He is a cultured cosmopolite of world.

cosmos.def: 宇宙、大世界、(植)大波斯菊人物 (單數) (宇)
cosmos.col: order of the cosmos, planting cosmos
cosmos.ex: The cosmos is full of mystery and joy.

cosset.def: 寵愛、溺愛、寵兒的人的人人物 (單數)
cosset.ex: They tended to cosset their only child.

cost.def: 花費、代價、報價、評估的人的人人物 (單數) (費)
cost.col: at all costs, cost of living, low cost, unit cost
cost.ex: We must save the dog at all costs now.

cost-effective.def: 合算的、划算的的人的人物 (划)
cost-effective.ex: This is a very cost-effective solution.

costly.def: 昂貴的人的人的人物 (單數) (貴)
costly.ex: That proved to be a very costly mistake.

costover.ex: A price costover occurred this morning.

costume.def: 服裝、劇裝、女套裝的人物 (單數) (裝)
costume.col: costume party, national costume, period costume
costume.ex: Everyone wore a period costume tonight.

costumier.def: 服裝商、戲裝製作者人物 (單數)
costumier.ex: The skilled costumier made the dress.

cosy/cozy.def: 舒適的、暖和的人的人物 (單數) (舒)
cosy/cozy.ex: It was a very small and cosy local room.

cot.def: 輕便小床、嬰兒床、小木屋人物 (單數) (床)
cot.ex: The small baby slept peacefully in cot.

cote.def: 小舍、畜棚、鴿籠的人的人人物 (單數)
cote.ex: White birds lived in the small dove cote.

cotemporary.def: 同時代的的人的人物 (單數)
cotemporary.ex: He is a cotemporary writer with John.

coterie.def: (有共同興趣的)小圈子、小團體人物 (單數) (圈)
coterie.ex: The literary coterie met every Monday.

cotillion/cotillon.def: 科蒂倫舞、華麗的四人舞人物 (單數)
cotillion/cotillon.ex: They performed the cotillion at ball.

cottage.def: 農舍、小屋、郊外別墅人物 (單數) (舍)
cottage.col: thatched cottage, cottage cheese, cottage industry
cottage.ex: They lived in a small thatched cottage.

cottager.def: 住農舍者、農民人物 (單數)
cottager.ex: The poor cottager worked in the field.

cotter/cottar.def: 農民、銷栓、平頭釘的人的人人物 (單數)
cotter/cottar.ex: Use a cotter pin to fix the metal bar.

cotton.def: 棉花、棉布、棉線、理解的人的人人物 (單數) (棉)
cotton.col: cotton wool, cotton on (理解), cotton gin
cotton.ex: The shirt is made of 100% warm cotton.

cottonmouth.ex: A venomous cottonmouth swam in river.

couch.def: 長沙發、診察台、表達、躺下的人的人人物 (單數) (發)
couch.col: couch potato (懶鬼), couch in words
couch.ex: The request was couched in polite words.

cougar.def: 美洲獅、美洲豹人物 (單數) (獅)
cougar.ex: The wild cougar is a stealthy hunter.

cough.def: 咳嗽、咳出、發出咳聲的人的人人物 (單數) (咳)
cough.col: cough up (咳出、付錢), dry cough, cough mixture
cough.ex: He had a very bad dry cough all night.

coulomb.def: (物)庫倫(電荷單位)人物 (單數) (庫)
coulomb.ex: The coulomb is the unit of electric charge.

coulter.ex: The sharp coulter cut through the grass.

council.def: 會議、委員會、座談會的人物 (單數) (委)
council.col: city council, student council, parish council
council.ex: The city council met to talk about taxes.

councillor/councilor.ex: She is a local councillor for the area.

counsel.def: 建議、法律顧問、律師、商議的人的人人物 (單數) (建)
counsel.col: legal counsel, follow counsel, keep one's own counsel
counsel.ex: He decided to follow his doctor's counsel.

counseling/counselling.def: 諮商、心理諮詢的人 (或物) (諮)
counseling/counselling.ex: He is receiving trauma counseling now.

counselor/counsellor.def: 顧問、法律顧問、導師、參贊人物 (單數) (顧)

count.def: 計算、總數、重要、伯爵的人的人人物 (單數) (計)
count.col: count on (依靠), keep count, count as
count.ex: Every small local vote will count tonight.

countable.def: 可計算的人的人人物 (單數)
countable.ex: Apples are a common countable noun.

countdown.ex: The final countdown to launch has begun.

countenance.def: 面容、神色、贊成的人物、贊成的人的人人物 (單數) (容)
countenance.ex: He managed to keep a calm countenance.

counter.def: 櫃檯、計算器、反對、逆向地的人物、反對的人的人人物 (單數) (櫃)
counter.col: checkout counter, over the counter (場外、零售), counter-attack
counter.ex: She bought the drugs over the counter.

counteract.def: 抵銷、阻礙、對抗的人的人
counteract.ex: The drug will counteract the poison.

counteraction.def: 中和、抵銷、反作用的人物 (單數) (中)
counteraction.ex: The force of counteraction was very strong.

counteractive.def: 反對的人、抵銷的人的人物 (單數)
counteractive.ex: The law had a counteractive effect.

counterattack.def: 反攻、反擊的人物、反擊的人的人人物 (單數) (反)
counterattack.ex: The army launched a fierce counterattack.

counterbalance.def: 平衡、抵消的人的人物、平衡的人的人人物 (單數) (平)

countercheck.def: 覆核、制止的人物、覆核的人的人人物 (單數) (核)
countercheck.ex: Please do a final countercheck of files.

counterclaim.def: 反訴、反要求人物 (單數) (訴)
counterclaim.ex: The company filed a strong counterclaim.

counterclockwise.def: 逆時針方向底人物、逆時針方向底的人的人物 (單數) (逆)
counterclockwise.ex: Please turn the small knob counterclockwise.

countercurrent.def: 逆流的人物、逆流的人的人物 (單數) (逆)
countercurrent.ex: There is a strong countercurrent in sea.

counterespionage.def: 反間諜活動人物 (單數) (諜)

counterfeit.def: 偽造的、假冒的、偽鈔人物、偽造的人的人人物 (單數) (偽)
counterfeit.ex: The man was caught with counterfeit money.
